li.label: Troubled past
li.description: I carry dark memories.

li.label: I'm doomed.
li.description: Maybe today is the day I die?

li.label: Uncomfortable
li.description: The emptiness in their eyes is making me uncomfortable

li.label: Are... are you alright?
li.description: I think this person needs a hug

li.label: Always cheery
li.description: Always cheery

li.label: Yay, let's hang out!
li.description: Always cheery

li.label: Blah, blah, blah
li.description: Yeah, I know, you're awesome...

li.label: Shut up about yourself already!
li.description: I hate you. Beacause I want to be like you.

li.label: There's no room for you here!
li.description: Only for me.

li.label: Can we talk about something else now?
li.description: Uhuh, okay, yeah, mhm.

li.label: Bad vibes
li.description: You're such bad vibes.

li.label: Oh, not this again
li.description: Just get over it!

li.label: You're right, absolutely right!
li.description: I agree, everything is going to shit!

li.label: Really? Is that so?
li.description: This person has things down.

li.label: Oh, wow, really? I'm listening!
li.description: This person knows a lot of stuff.

li.label: I really respect your take on life!
li.description: This person is scared of nothing and I like it.

li.label: Take your foolishness somewhere else
li.description: This person is scared of nothing and it's stupid.

li.label: I wish I had the guts to do what you do
li.description: This person is scared of nothing. I wish I was like that.

li.label: A friend of growing things is a friend of mine!
li.description: This person is like me.

li.label: A friend of knowledge is a friend of mine!
li.description: This person is like me.

li.label: A simple outdoors person is a friend of mine!
li.description: This person is like me.

li.description: This person is like me.

li.label: Fellow close combat fighter, I salute you!
li.description: This person is like me.

li.label: Better safe than sorry - very sensible
li.description: This person is like me.

li.label: Coward, we would be better off without you
li.description: This person is not like me.

li.label: heard a good joke
li.description: I heard a good joke today.

li.label: heard a bad joke
li.description: I heard a bad joke today.

li.label: ate meal with one ingredient
li.description: This was such a boring meal. Don't we have something more appealing?

li.label: ate meal with two ingredients
li.description: I liked this meal. It was kinda neat.

li.label: ate meal with three ingredients
li.description: I ate a great meal, it had a nice bit of variety in it.

li.label: ate meal with four ingredients
li.description: This meal was incredible. It was very fulfilling.

li.label: ate meal with five ingredients
li.description: I ate an amazing meal, every little detail just came together in a glorious result.

li.label: ate raw insect meat
li.description: Raw insect meat really reminds me of the nice times back home.

li.label: ate cooked insect meat
li.description: I ate a meal that contained insect meat. The seasoning really made the insects glands and fluid pockets shine!

li.label: sleep lover well rested
li.description: I slept really nicely last night.

li.label: darkness
li.description: I've been in the dark for a while. I really don't like it.

li.label: nyctophobic can't sleep
li.description: It's too dark in here. I can't sleep like this.

li.label: witnessed pain with sadism
li.description: Seeing them suffering in pain is the greatest pleasure of them all. I could watch it all day.

li.label: hurt someone
li.description: I'm causing pain and suffering! Their screams are like music to my ears!

li.label: sadist organ harvested
li.description: A little bit of this, a little bit of that.. Isn't it great making them into something more valueable?

li.label: chionophile enjoying the weather
li.description: It's so beautiful when it's snowing. I could watch it all day.

li.label: cramped space
li.description: I need to get out of here! I can't breathe..! The walls..

li.label: rather tight
li.description: There really isn't enough space in here, it feels as if the walls are closing in.

li.label: It's finally over
li.description: I thought it was never going to end..

li.label: awful prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is an awful place.

li.label: decent prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is pretty decent.

li.label: slightly impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell seems to be a nice place.

li.label: impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a room like this.

li.label: very impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is very impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a room like this. I love it!

li.label: extremely impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is extremely impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a room like this. I love it!

li.label: unbelievably impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is unbelievably impressive. This is the best place ever!

li.label: wondrously impressive prison cell
li.description: My prison cell is the best place one can ever imagine. I can stay here forever.

li.label: awful barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is an awful place.

li.label: dull barrack
li.description: I'm living in a dull barrack.

li.label: slightly impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is slightly impressive.

li.label: somewhat impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is impressive. I like it.

li.label: very impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is very impressive. I like it.

li.label: extremely impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is extremely impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a place like this.

li.label: unbelievably impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is unbelievably impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a place like this.

li.label: wondrously impressive barrack
li.description: My prison barrack is wonderful! I can't believe they are keeping me in a place like this.

li.label: awful bedroom
li.description: I had to sleep in an awful bedroom.

li.label: dull bedroom
li.description: I had to sleep in a dull bedroom.

li.label: mediocre bedroom
li.description: I had to sleep in a mediocre bedroom.

li.label: slightly impressive bedroom
li.description: I got to sleep in a pretty nice bedroom.

li.label: very impressive bedroom
li.description: I slept in a very impressive bedroom.

li.label: extremely impressive bedroom
li.description: I slept in an extremely impressive bedroom.

li.label: unbelievably impressive bedroom
li.description: The bedroom I slept in was so impressive.

li.label: wondrously impressive bedroom
li.description: I slept in a bedroom that was simply wondrous.

li.label: awful barrack
li.description: I had to sleep in an awful barrack.

li.label: decent barrack
li.description: I got to sleep in a pretty decent barrack.

li.label: slightly impressive barrack
li.description: I got to sleep in a slightly impressive barrack. I like it.

li.label: impressive barrack
li.description: I slept in an impressive barrack. It was great.

li.label: very impressive barrack
li.description: I slept in a very impressive barrack. I love it.

li.label: extremely impressive barrack
li.description: I slept in an extremely impressive barrack. It was marvelous.

li.label: unbelievably impressive barrack
li.description: I slept in an unbelievably impressive barrack. It was truly astounding.

li.label: wondrously impressive barrack
li.description: I slept in a heavenly barrack. It was wondrous.

li.label: communal slept all alone
li.description: I wish I could share my room with someone..

li.label: communal didn't sleep alone
li.description: I like being able to share my room.

li.label: communal slept with a few people
li.description: It's neat being able to share my room.

li.label: communal slept with others
li.description: I like sharing my room with others.

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: It's cool being able to share my room with many others!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: It's really cool having many others sleep in my room with me!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: There are so many nice people sleeping inside my room with me!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: More and more and more and more!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: The number of others sleeping in my room with me is making me so happy!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: Sharing my room with so many other people is the greatest thing ever!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: With so many other people in my room, I don't ever have to feel alone at night.

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: It's so great! We get to sleep together in this room!

li.label: early bird is up early
li.description: The early hours are the best part of the day!

li.label: early bird is up late
li.description: I don't like working late.

li.label: gregarious all alone
li.description: I wish I had some company...

li.label: gregarious not alone
li.description: I like having someone around.

li.label: gregarious has some company
li.description: It's neat having a few people around.

li.label: gregarious has some company
li.description: I like having {NUMBER} people around.

li.label: gregarious has company
li.description: It's cool having {NUMBER} people around!

li.label: gregarious has company
li.description: It's really cool having {NUMBER} people around!

li.label: gregarious likes company
li.description: There are so many nice people here!

li.label: gregarious likes company
li.description: More and more and more and more!

li.label: gregarious enjoys company
li.description: {NUMBER} and we are still not stopping! It's just so great!

li.label: gregarious enjoys company
li.description: This is the place of my dreams!

li.label: gregarious loves company
li.description: With {NUMBER} people here, I have interesting encounters every day!

li.label: gregarious lives dream
li.description: I would have never dreamt of this, and yet I can experience it.

li.label: gun crazy has melee weapon
li.description: What is this, it can't even shoot?

li.label: gun crazy has ranged weapon
li.description: For my neutral special, I wield a gun!

li.label: misanthrope hates everyone
li.description: misanthrope hates everyone

li.label: moody pawn is very unhappy
li.description: I hate how everything is going.

li.label: moody pawn is unhappy
li.description: I really dislike the current situation.

li.label: moody pawn is happy
li.description: Today is a good day.

li.label: moody pawn is very happy
li.description: Everything has been going great!

li.label: woke up from narcoleptic sleep
li.description: I... fell asleep

li.label: pacifist has weapon
li.description: I dislike having to carry a weapon.

li.label: witnessed death as pacifist
li.description: Another senseless death.

li.label: pacifist killed animal
li.description: I killed an animal. I could have probably avoided that.

li.label: pacifist killed humanlike
li.description: I killed another person, while I advocate for peace and compassion.

li.label: pluviophile enjoying the rain
li.description: I love the calm and peaceful nature of rain.

li.label: pyrophobic has incendiary weapon
li.description: I hate fire. Why do I need to burn things?

li.label: pyrophobic has burns
li.description: These burns remind me of scalding hot flames...

li.label: pyrophobic has burns
li.description: These burns remind me of scalding hot flames...

li.label: horrifying fire
li.description: It's going to burn me any second.. I can't be here. I can't be here. I can't be here...

li.label: pyrophobic burning
li.description: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

li.label: chilly
li.description: I'm uncomfortably cold.

li.label: cold
li.description: I'm so cold, I'm shivering.

li.label: numbing cold
li.description: I can't stop shivering. My teeth are chattering. All I can think of is getting warm.

li.label: absolutely freezing
li.description: My teeth are chattering so hard I can barely speak. My toes are numb. I need to get warm.

li.label: loving the cold
li.description: It's cold and I'm chilly, just how I like it!

li.label: sweaty
li.description: It's too hot here. I'm sweating.

li.label: hot
li.description: It's way too hot here. If I could just have a breath of cool air...

li.label: sweltering hot
li.description: I feel like I'm in an oven! I'm not sure how long I can handle this.

li.label: blistering hot

li.description: A cute animal nuzzled me!!!

li.description: We have a cute pet.

li.label: some animals
li.description: This is great already, I think we can house a few more though...

li.description: I love how many animals we've got!

li.description: Being together with my bonded animals makes me feel better.

li.description: I should be together with my bonded animals.

li.description: It's good to see the colony thriving.

li.description: I worry about my children. If they're not happy, I'm not happy.

li.label: ate nutrient paste meal

li.label: cramped space
li.description: I need to get out of here! I can't breathe..! The walls..

li.description: There really isn't enough space in here, it feels as if the walls are closing in.

li.label: It's finally over
li.description: I thought it was never going to end..

li.description: My prison cell is extremely impressive. I can't believe they are keeping me in a room like this. I love it!

li.description: My prison cell is the best place one can ever imagine. I can stay here forever.

li.description: More and more and more and more!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: The number of others sleeping in my room with me is making me so happy!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: Sharing my room with so many other people is the greatest thing ever!

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: With so many other people in my room, I don't ever have to feel alone at night.

li.label: communal slept with many others
li.description: It's so great! We get to sleep together in this room!

li.description: I really dislike the current situation.

li.description: Today is a good day.

li.description: Another senseless death.

li.label: pacifist killed animal
li.description: I killed an animal. I could have probably avoided that.

li.label: pacifist killed humanlike
li.description: I killed another person, while I advocate for peace and compassion.

li.label: pluviophile enjoying the rain
li.description: I love the calm and peaceful nature of rain.

li.description: I hate fire. Why do I need to burn things?

li.description: These burns remind me of scalding hot flames...

li.label: pyrophobic has burns
li.description: These burns remind me of scalding hot flames...

li.description: Keep it away from me.. Keep it away from me.. Keep it away from me..

li.label: pyrophobic running from fire
li.description: I'm getting out of here! This is insane!

li.label: sleepyhead got up himself
li.description: I feel great after getting to sleep some more!

li.description: It's cold and I'm chilly, just how I like it!

li.label: gun nut has ranged weapon
li.description: I love guns! Where's something I can shoot at?

li.label: serendipitous
li.description: Natural bonus from 'serendipitous' trait.

li.label: iron fist has ranged weapon
li.description: I don't want to shoot from a distance, I want to fight using my hands!

li.label: nightmarish environment
li.description: This place is repulsive beyond description. I wish I could be anywhere else.

li.label: hideous environment
li.description: This place is so unbearably grotesque. I wish I didn't have to look at this any more.

li.label: ugly environment
li.description: This place is really ugly. I wish I didn't have to look at all this.

li.label: beautiful environment
li.description: I really like this place. It's beautiful.

li.label: gorgeous environment
li.description: This place is so beautiful. It lifts me up and makes me love life.

li.label: paradisic environment
li.description: This beauty of this place is rapturous. I wish I'd never have to leave.

li.label: afraid of wild animals
li.description: How am I supposed to keep calm when such a savage creature is nearby?!

li.label: bookworm read recently
li.description: Reading is a joy.

li.label: talked with a conversationalist
li.description: What a stimulating conversation.

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: I've been around a few skullspikes recently. They make for great ambiance.

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: I've been around quite a few skullspikes recently. It sends a shiver down my spine - in a good way!

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: All these skullspikes have made my day!

li.label: observed corpse
li.description: I got to see a dead body!

li.label: stressed by a hysteric
li.description: I got too close to someone having a hysteric fit. It was disturbing.

li.label: lovesick
li.description: There's an empty space in my heart. It hurts so much.

li.label: missing my lover
li.description: I wish my love was here with me.

li.label: love is wonderful
li.description: I'm no longer alone! I'm on top of the world!

li.label: let a lovesick down
li.description: I just broke that poor sap's heart over my knee, and it feels awful.

li.label: rebuffed a lovesick
li.description: I fended off that weirdo's advances, but the melodrama of it really got to me.

li.label: mariner is wet
li.description: I'm soaking wet.

li.label: entombed underground
li.description: I've been underground too long. I feel like the weight of this mountain is crushing me. I need to see the sky and feel the wind.

li.label: trapped underground
li.description: How long have I been underground? I need to get out in the fresh air and spend some time under the sky.

li.label: cabin fever
li.description: I've spent so long indoors I feel like the roof is pressing in. I need to get out and see the sky.

li.label: trapped indoors
li.description: It's been too long since I've seen the sky.

li.label: stuck indoors
li.description: I'd like to go outside and get some fresh air.

li.label: chilly
li.description: I'm cold.

li.label: cold
li.description: I'm shivering.

li.label: numbing cold
li.description: My teeth are chattering.

li.label: absolutely freezing
li.description: My toes are numb. I need to get warm.

li.label: sweaty
li.description: I'm sweating.

li.label: hot
li.description: It's really hot out.

li.label: sweltering hot
li.description: You could fry an egg on the ground right now.

li.label: blistering hot
li.description: This place is searing hot, dangerously so.

li.label: forming a caravan
li.description: I can't wait to be out on the road!

li.label: out on the road
li.description: Out on the road, but with nowhere to go... out on the road, out on the road I go.

li.label: people pleaser
li.description: Mood from the 'people pleaser' trait, equal to a fifth of the average opinion everyone one knows has of oneself.

li.label: witnessed mental break
li.description: Such exquisite suffering...

li.label: witnessed hysteric fit
li.description: What hilarity! Hysteria is so delightful to witness.

li.label: {0} savored my suffering
li.description: To make fun of me at my lowest - how callous!

li.label: skulker is invisible
li.description: We move unseen.

li.label: sniper needs ranged weapon
li.description: I hate having to get up close and personal. I need a ranged weapon.

li.label: tempestophile
li.description: The 'Tempestophile' trait grants bonus mood while 1) under the open sky and 2) either the weather is not clear, or an exotic-yet-natural meteorological event is occuring.

li.label: textile naked
li.description: I'm naked. This is humiliating.

li.label: beauty vanity
li.description: Mood from the 'vain' trait, equal to 5 times one's own beauty score, and further modified by the number of masterwork or legendary items worn.

li.label: wearing awful apparel
li.description: Why am I wearing this!? It offends every fiber of my being, and I must discard it as soon as possible.

li.label: wearing poor apparel
li.description: I am wearing dismally plebian apparel. I very much want to discard it right now.

li.label: wearing normal apparel
li.description: Others may call its quality "normal", but I'm wearing something that is beneath my standards, and I should discard it.

li.label: viciousness needs release
li.description: I need to express myself... by hurting something... a lot.

li.label: uncomfortable?
li.description: Nah.

li.label: comfortable
li.description: I've been comfortable recently.

li.label: quite comfortable
li.description: I've been very comfortable recently.

li.label: extremely comfortable
li.description: I've been extremely comfortable recently. This place is so cushy!

li.label: luxuriantly comfortable
li.description: I am resting on clouds of heaven.

li.label: uncomfortable?
li.description: Genetically deadened senses are preventing a mood malus from discomfort.

li.label: comfortable
li.description: Genetically deadened senses will prevent any mood malus from discomfort.

li.label: quite comfortable
li.description: Genetically deadened senses will prevent any mood malus from discomfort.

li.label: extremely comfortable
li.description: Genetically deadened senses will prevent any mood malus from discomfort.

li.label: luxuriantly comfortable
li.description: Genetically deadened senses will prevent any mood malus from discomfort.

li.label: need for superiority
li.description: I need to feel above others, either by having slaves or by holding a position of authority. The more slaves, the better.

li.label: the stench of slavery
li.description: No one should be enslaved.

li.label: freedom for all
li.description: It is good that nobody is enslaved or imprisoned.

li.label: Superstitious (horrifying omen)
li.description: I have witnessed a particularly fell portent. What woe does it portend?

li.label: Superstitious (bad omen)
li.description: Something wicked this way comes.

li.label: Superstitious (good omen)
li.description: Something good will happen soon, I'm sure of it.

li.label: Superstitious (wondrous omen)
li.description: I've seen an amazing sign - everything's coming up aces!

li.label: xenogenetic abomination
li.description: My genetic purity was sullied with filth.

li.label: misopedist
li.description: Any children is too many.

li.label: caretaker
li.description: Children are a joy and a gift. The more children, the merrier.

li.label: misopedist is pregnant
li.description: I have got one of the disgusting little things inside me.

li.label: caretaker is pregnant
li.description: I have been entrusted with the greatest responsibility.

li.label: I'm a mechanitor
li.description: I'm so glad I have the privilege to conduct mechanoids.

li.label: I'm a mechanitor
li.description: No one should have this power. This insidious thing in my brain... no good can come from it.

li.label: mechaphile
li.description: It is right for man and machine for coexist. The more mechanoids we have around, the better.

li.label: mechaphobe
li.description: The more mechanoids we have around, the more I worry for our safety.

li.label: saw allied mechanoid die
li.description: Mechs can be rebuilt, but they never come back the same. We lost someone.

li.label: killed a mechanoid
li.description: Frakkin' clankers.

li.label: environmentalism
li.description: Environmentalists are unhappy in more polluted lands, but very happy in unpolluted ones.

li.label: I'm a mechanitor
li.description: I don't want this power.

li.label: environmentalist vs smog
li.description: This world is hurting.

li.label: unnatural catastrophe
li.description: The void will break this world under the weight of an endless black sky. It makes me shiver with anticipation.

li.label: planetkiller catastrophe
li.description: A planetkiller is on its way. It will be here soon - and oh, when it arrives, everything will be unmade in glorious fire.

li.label: climate catastrophe
li.description: The 'catastrophist' trait grants bonus mood while 1) under the open sky and 2) there is a destructive climatological event occuring, such as a volcanic winter or toxic fallout.

li.label: uncorrupted
li.description: The void? Huh?

li.label: minor corruption
li.description: It stirs. Something unspeakable looms in the edges of my perceptions.

li.label: moderate corruption
li.description: Maddened murmurings reach me even now... from the depths of darkness, something beckons...

li.label: major corruption
li.description: There is nowhere to hide. There never was. Sightless, its gaze pierces all places and moments. Sleepless, its dreams run manifest. Formless, yet I can feel it all about me-!

li.label: utter corruption
li.description: I understand now! The binding force of the universe is hatred! It runs thick, hot, lightless; braiding and twining madly in the space-beneath-space. This cosmos, with its stars and its lives and its hope and happiness and laughter - it is all some sick, malformed joke!

li.label: lingering corruption
li.description: The harsh cacophany of the void has dimmed, but it was not banished from this world. It lingers at the edges of my thoughts still.

li.label: haunted
li.description: It is always out there, lurking. I feel its attention upon me like a physical thing, slick and oily and choking.

li.label: killed an unnatural entity
li.description: I am what the night fears.

li.label: safe from monsters
li.description: Our world is safe from the void - or, at least, as safe as anyone can be from that realm of nightmare.

li.label: monster love unattainable
li.description: open the void open the void open the void open the void open the void

li.label: twisted yearning
li.description: I am shackled by my humanity. Something glorious waits on the other side...

li.label: down with empire!
li.description: Empire is a parasitic, unsustainable force, and we should not be complicit in its atrocities.

li.label: wants to be led
li.description: I don't want to lead anyone. In fact, I want others in strong positions of leadership.

li.label: transcendent speech echo
li.description: That was just what I needed to hear.

li.label: daily goldfinch euphoria
li.description: I'm on top of the world!

li.label: transcendent terror
li.description: Evil surrounds us. Unspeakable evil...

li.label: happy transcendent ptarmigan
li.description: I feel so light. Everything is clear!

li.label: transcendent swan bond
li.description: I can feel a benevolent, tender presence. It promises everything will be alright...

li.label: nightmarish environment
li.description: This place is repulsive beyond description. I wish I could be anywhere else.

li.label: hideous environment
li.description: This place is so unbearably grotesque. I wish I didn't have to look at this any more.

li.label: ugly environment
li.description: This place is really ugly. I wish I didn't have to look at all this.

li.label: beautiful environment
li.description: I really like this place. It's beautiful.

li.label: gorgeous environment
li.description: This place is so beautiful. It lifts me up and makes me love life.

li.label: paradisic environment
li.description: This beauty of this place is rapturous. I wish I'd never have to leave.

li.label: afraid of wild animals
li.description: How am I supposed to keep calm when such a savage creature is nearby?!

li.label: bookworm read recently
li.description: Reading is a joy.

li.label: talked with a conversationalist
li.description: What a stimulating conversation.

li.label: curmudgeon irritated
li.description: I hate talking with happy people. They're so annoying.

li.label: curmudgeon vs happy
li.description: I hate talking with happy people. They're so annoying.

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: I've been around a few skullspikes recently. They make for great ambiance.

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: I've been around quite a few skullspikes recently. It sends a shiver down my spine - in a good way!

li.label: skullspikes
li.description: All these skullspikes have made my day!

li.label: observed corpse
li.description: I got to see a dead body!

li.label: stressed by a hysteric
li.description: I got too close to someone having a hysteric fit. It was disturbing.

li.label: lovesick
li.description: There's an empty space in my heart. It hurts so much.

li.label: missing my lover
li.description: I wish my love was here with me.

li.label: love is wonderful
li.description: I'm no longer alone! I'm on top of the world!

li.label: let a lovesick down
li.description: I just broke that poor sap's heart over my knee, and it feels awful.

li.label: rebuffed a lovesick
li.description: I fended off that weirdo's advances, but the melodrama of it really got to me.

li.label: mariner is wet
li.description: I'm soaking wet.

li.label: entombed underground
li.description: I've been underground too long. I feel like the weight of this mountain is crushing me. I need to see the sky and feel the wind.

li.label: trapped underground
li.description: How long have I been underground? I need to get out in the fresh air and spend some time under the sky.

li.label: cabin fever
li.description: I've spent so long indoors I feel like the roof is pressing in. I need to get out and see the sky.

li.label: trapped indoors
li.description: It's been too long since I've seen the sky.

li.label: stuck indoors
li.description: I'd like to go outside and get some fresh air.

li.label: chilly
li.description: I'm cold.

li.label: cold
li.description: I'm shivering.

li.label: numbing cold
li.description: My teeth are chattering.

li.label: absolutely freezing
li.description: My toes are numb. I need to get warm.

li.label: sweaty
li.description: I'm sweating.

li.label: hot
li.description: It's really hot out.

li.label: sweltering hot
li.description: You could fry an egg on the ground right now.

li.label: blistering hot
li.description: This place is searing hot, dangerously so.

li.label: forming a caravan
li.description: I can't wait to be out on the road!

li.label: out on the road
li.description: Out on the road, but with nowhere to go... out on the road, out on the road I go.

li.label: people pleaser
li.description: Mood from the 'people pleaser' trait, equal to a fifth of the average opinion everyone one knows has of oneself.

li.label: witnessed mental break
li.description: Such exquisite suffering...

li.label: witnessed hysteric fit
li.description: What hilarity! Hysteria is so delightful to witness.

li.label: {0} savored my suffering
li.description: To make fun of me at my lowest - how callous!

li.label: skulker is invisible
li.description: We move unseen.

li.label: sniper needs ranged weapon
li.description: I hate having to get up close and personal. I need a ranged weapon.

li.label: yearning for sunlight
li.description: I love the feel of the sun on my skin.

li.label: basking in the sun
li.description: It's so relaxing to feel the sun on my skin.

li.label: tempestophile
li.description: The 'Tempestophile' trait grants bonus mood while 1) under the open sky and 2) either the weather is not clear, or an exotic-yet-natural meteorological event is occuring.

li.label: wearing normal apparel
li.description: Others may call its quality "normal", but I'm wearing something that is beneath my standards, and I should discard it.

li.label: viciousness needs release
li.description: I need to express myself... by hurting something... a lot.

li.label: wielding unique weapon
li.description: I can express my art to its fullest potential with this beautiful weapon.

li.label: chronic nightmares
li.description: I don't want to fall asleep again. Don't let me go to sleep again!

li.label: vivid dreams
li.description: I just had a really beautiful dream.

li.description: I need to feel above others, either by having slaves or by holding a position of authority. The more slaves, the better.

li.description: No one should be enslaved.

li.label: earthborne in space
li.description: This is too high up. I miss the solid ground...

li.label: skybound in space
li.description: Can we get much higher? ... Maybe, but this is pretty good.

li.label: earthborne forced to fly
li.description: I hate flying! I never want to leave the ground ever again.

li.label: skybound got to fly
li.description: What a rush! What a thrill! Let's do it again!

li.label: angler fished recently
li.description: Fishing is a joy.

li.label: no fish nearby
li.description: How am I gonna fish... WITHOUT FISH!?

li.label: pescatarian ate fish
li.description: Fish are food, not friends. And what tasty food they are!

li.label: globetrotter
li.description: The "Globetrotter" trait grants +0.5 mood per unique biome or landmark feature witnessed.

li.label: down with empire!
li.description: Empire is a parasitic, unsustainable force, and we should not be complicit in its atrocities.

li.label: wants to be led
li.description: I don't want to lead anyone. In fact, I want others in strong positions of leadership.

li.label: transcendent speech echo
li.description: That was just what I needed to hear.

li.description: I'm on top of the world!

li.label: 自然天成
li.description: 我的身心如此纯净完美。

li.label: 画蛇添足
li.description: 我不需要任何植入物，这是对我的侮辱。

li.label: 自然天成
li.description: 我的身心如此纯净完美。

li.label: 画蛇添足
li.description: 我不需要任何植入物，这是对我的侮辱。

li.label: shared kind words
li.description: It felt good to say something nice.

li.label: nice words
li.description: I've been bestowed with kind words! What a nice person! :D

li.label: Paranoid
li.description: Good luck? Can’t fool me!

li.label: New stuff
li.description: Shopping is just therapeutic for me.

li.label: listened to virtuoso
li.description: The music played by a virtuoso was truly inspiring.

li.label: Feeling pretty
li.description: The mirror told me I’m the prettiest person in the world!

li.label: Feeling ugly
li.description: The mirror told me to unalive myself.

li.label: tainted {0}
li.description: I am wearing a piece of apparel that made from animal fur. It creeps me out and feels dirty.

li.label: tainted {0} (+1)
li.description: I am wearing two pieces of apparel that made from animal fur. It creeps me out and feels dirty.

li.label: tainted {0} (+2)
li.description: I am wearing three pieces of apparel that made from animal fur. It creeps me out and feels dirty.

li.label: tainted {0} etc
li.description: I am wearing four or more pieces of apparel that made from fur. It creeps me out and feels dirty.

li.label: No poker table
li.description: Just one game please, my fingers are itchy!
